name: GDN-Hybrid + Sliding Window Attention + Warmdown1000 + Int6 GPTQ
blurb: SP1024 GDN-Hybrid fixed-predictor run with Sliding Window Attention, warmdown=1000, and int6 GPTQ. The original run051-safe031 val_bpb was computed with a buggy SentencePiece byte-accounting LUT; code is patched here and corrected val_bpb is pending re-score from saved artifacts.
author: Joshua Martinez
architecture: SP1024 GDN-Hybrid ([GDN×5] -> SWA -> [GDN×5] -> SWA_shared), MuonEq-R + AdamW, EMA 0.997, warmdown=1000, int6 GPTQ + zstd-22, self-contained record packaging.
